name: form-reset
title: Form Reset
description: Resets uncontrolled custom control state when a parent native form is reset.

docs.description: Resets uncontrolled custom control state when a parent native form is reset.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Element ref used to find the closest parent form.

parameters.name: resetValue
parameters.description: Value passed to onReset when the parent form dispatches a native reset event.

parameters.name: onReset
parameters.description: Called with resetValue when the parent form resets.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Set to false for controlled components or when native form reset integration should be disabled.

returns.description: Registers a reset listener on the closest parent form while enabled.

notes.title: Uncontrolled custom controls
notes.content: Use this hook when a custom control mirrors native input behavior and should return to its default value on form reset.

notes.title: Latest reset value
notes.content: The reset listener stays stable while reading the latest resetValue and onReset callback.

content.text: border border-border bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm text-foreground
w-fit border border-border bg-muted px-3 py-1.5 font-mono text-sm text-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-background
